query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_participants (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sessionId INT NOT NULL,
  physicianId INT NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('owner', 'consultant', 'observer') DEFAULT 'consultant' NOT NULL,
  joinedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  lastActiveAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  leftAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (sessionId) REFERENCES clinical_sessions(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (physicianId) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_comments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sessionId INT NOT NULL,
  physicianId INT NOT NULL,
  commentText TEXT NOT NULL,
  commentType ENUM('general', 'diagnosis', 'treatment', 'recommendation') DEFAULT 'general' NOT NULL,
  replyToId INT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  isEdited BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (sessionId) REFERENCES clinical_sessions(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (physicianId) REFERENCES users(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_activity (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  sessionId INT NOT NULL,
  physicianId INT NOT NULL,
  activityType VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  activityData JSON NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (sessionId) REFERENCES clinical_sessions(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (physicianId) REFERENCES users(id)
);
